blocks.title: Seahorse, Summerhill, Toronto
blocks.body:
📍 Seahorse, Summerhill, Toronto
1226 Yonge St, Toronto, ON M4T 1W3
———————————————

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Summerhill — Yonge Street just north of Summerhill station

Modern French brasserie in a 130-year-old room. Exposed brick, warm wood, tawny leather banquettes, original floors. The focal point is the L-shaped oyster bar lined with chrome-and-cerulean stools.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

Freshly squeezed citrus, thoughtful cocktails. Richard Renaud (co-owner) often behind the bar shaking drinks with a juicer he brought from home.

🍸 **Signature cocktails:**
• Olive Oil Sour — $19. Light, fruity, buttery. Amaretto, Amaro, olive oil, egg white foam.
• Salted Peanut Espresso Martini — $21. Salty, nutty, bitter espresso. Inspired by Nashville peanut butter whiskey.

One-liner: "Part tropical cocktail, part cozy campfire concoction."

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

**RAW BAR**
• Small Ice Box — $48 ⭐
  Oysters, mussel escabeche, wild Argentinian shrimp, dry-aged kampachi crudo
• Large Ice Box — $68
  Larger portions of everything above

**APPETIZERS**
• Tuna Tartare — $25 ⭐
  Canadian bluefin tuna, white soy, fermented plum vinegar, crème fraîche, finger lime
• Scallop Aguachile — $33
  Hokkaido scallops, yuzu, Calabrian chili oil
• Seahorse Salad — $19
  Frilly lolla rossa lettuce, puffed grains, pickled chanterelles, buttermilk dressing

**MAINS**
• The Fish — $29 ⭐
  Smoky Atlantic mackerel, grilled kale, salsa verde
• East Coast Scallops — $31
  Pan-seared, golden-brown crust, béarnaise
• Octopus — $69
  With silky seafood sauce (like lobster bisque)

**DESSERT**
• Pear Cake — $16
  Warm, cloud-like crumb, caramel sauce, subtle pear
• Soft-Serve Ice Cream — $10
  Olive oil drizzle, Maldon salt, pistachios

**Note:** Portions are shareable. Menu is concise, designed for tasting.

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$$$ (High-end seafood)

**Dinner for 2:** $150-250 (with drinks, sharing plates)

**Reservations:** OpenTable
**Walk-ins:** Limited — 38 seats, intimate space

📞 (437) 538-4518
🌐 seahorserestaurant.ca

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Monday: Closed
Tuesday–Thursday: 4–10pm
Friday–Saturday: 4–11pm  
Sunday: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• **Weekday evenings (Tue–Thu)** — Quieter, easier to get a table
• **Avoid weekends** — Small space fills quickly
• **Oyster happy hour?** Not currently, but check for seasonal promotions
• **Seasonal note:** Summerhill neighborhood is walkable in warmer months — perfect for pre-dinner stroll

**The team:** Co-owners Simon Bower (Lucien, Mercer Street Grill) + Richard Renaud (Piano Piano), Executive Chef Federico Garcia (ex-George, Quetzal sous chef), Eamon Clark (11-time national oyster-shucking champion).

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
